query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='item_historial' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%item%'; SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='pines' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%item%'
